scripts.build: bun run --filter=@mizan/core build && bun run --filter=@mizan/memory build
scripts.test: bun run --filter=@mizan/core test && bun run --filter=@mizan/memory test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter=@mizan/core typecheck && bun run --filter=@mizan/memory typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --filter=@mizan/core lint && bun run --filter=@mizan/memory lint
